top_signals.title: These are America's 10 most expensive states for 2026, where inflation is punishing residents
top_signals.summary: These 10 U.S. states are the most expensive places to live in America in 2026, with inflation punishing residents to an extreme degree.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Senate Democrats call for hearings into Trump’s ties to crypto amid CLARITY Act discussions
top_signals.summary: Five senators called for committee hearings to investigate US President Donald Trump’s policies potentially being influenced by crypto funding from United Arab Emirates-linked and other entities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump flies old Air Force One out of Turkey, switches to new jet in Britain for trip home
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump unexpectedly left Turkey on Wednesday aboard an older Air Force One rather than the newly renovated Qatari-donated jet.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
